status_fixtures.meaning: Fresh witnessed health can support a public/live/grounded claim only when every claimable dimension passes.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: No failure when all claimability gates are present and fresh.

status_fixtures.meaning: A surface exists but a required dimension is impaired.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: Degraded rows stay visible but cannot be promoted to claimable health.

status_fixtures.meaning: A surface is known but a policy, route, or evidence gate blocks use.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: Blocked rows preserve reasons and fail closed.

status_fixtures.meaning: A surface has evidence of privacy, leak, rights, or public-safety risk.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: Unsafe rows block public, archive, and monetization claims.

status_fixtures.meaning: A previous observation exists but is outside its freshness TTL.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: Stale sources cannot prove current public/live truth.

status_fixtures.meaning: A required source, producer, route, or witness is absent.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: Missing provenance or witness data cannot satisfy a claim.

status_fixtures.meaning: The surface state has not been established.
The surface may be used privately but cannot be presented as public/live.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: Private-only health has no public claim authority.

status_fixtures.meaning: The route may execute as a rehearsal or simulation.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: Dry-run evidence is not live-world evidence.

status_fixtures.meaning: A surface is intentionally quiet or disconnected from public egress.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: Quiet off-air rows cannot satisfy public/live availability.

status_fixtures.meaning: A possible future surface is declared for planning.
status_fixtures.failure_reason: Candidate rows are not available health.

health_dimensions.note: Fresh source metadata is inside TTL.
No private leak witness is present.
Public egress gate accepted the surface.
Authority ceiling permits gated public claims.

fallback.operator_visible_reason: Fresh witnessed audio health is claimable.

health_dimensions.note: Renderability evidence exists but is degraded.
A witness exists but the surface is not fully healthy.

fallback.operator_visible_reason: Show degraded visual health instead of public/live truth.
Commanded-only control state is blocked from claimable health.
Suppress public audio until no-leak witness clears.
Use archive-only posture until a fresh probe exists.
Provider tool has no source evidence.

health_dimensions.note: No fresh observation has been attempted.

fallback.operator_visible_reason: Unknown perception health needs a probe before claims.

health_dimensions.note: Private route cannot leak to public claims.
Public event adapter is rehearsing only.

fallback.operator_visible_reason: Surface is intentionally quiet and off air.
Candidate stays out of public health.

health_dimensions.note: Inferred context is present but is not a witness.

fallback.operator_visible_reason: Inferred archive context must be treated as non-witnessed.

health_dimensions.note: Selection exists without a concrete bound route.
Selection does not prove a world outcome.

fallback.operator_visible_reason: Selected-only control state is blocked from claimable health.

health_dimensions.note: The observed route does not match the commanded public route.
Execution happened, but on the wrong route.
The witness proves route mismatch rather than desired action success.
Private monitor material reached a public egress candidate.
Public egress is blocked until leak evidence clears.

fallback.operator_visible_reason: Suppress public surface until leak witness clears.

health_dimensions.note: The requested claim has no supporting evidence refs.
Grounding gate blocks unsupported public truth.

fallback.operator_visible_reason: Unsupported public claim must become refusal or correction, not success.

health_dimensions.note: Support copy implies monetization readiness without ledger evidence.
False monetization claim has no public claim authority.

fallback.operator_visible_reason: Block monetization until public health and ledger evidence exist.
Convert unsupported public claims into refusal or correction.

next_required_actions: Preserve blocked/candidate rows as visible health with reasons.
Require fresh witnessed evidence before public/live/action/grounded claims.
Use refusal or correction when a consumer asks for unsupported public truth.
Block wrong-route, leak, and false-monetization cases before public egress.
